events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: a crimp ring failing the go/no-go gauge is a clear rough-in defect — the connection falls outside the manufacturer's allowable crimp tolerance (ASTM F1807 fittings), so it's a **fail**, high risk, with corrective action to cut out and replace the joint, re-gauge all crimps, and pressure test before covering.
